case_title: YOLANDA R ALEXANDER VS. ROY GUNNINE

BALANCE DUE FILED BY DEFENDANT GUNNINE, ROY

PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT YOLANDA R. ALEXANDER IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT ROY GUNNINE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON FILE. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALEXANDER, YOLANDA R AS TO DEFENDANT GUNNINE, ROY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-29-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YOLANDA ALEXANDER/CROSS-DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROY GUNNINE/CROSS-COMPLAINANT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT YOLANDA R. ALEXANDER IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT ROY GUNNINE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON FILE. STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY GUNNINE, ROY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDENT IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS CLAIMANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2023 - JUDGMENT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GUNNINE, ROY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, YOLANDA R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GUNNINE, ROY RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, YOLANDA R $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,250.00, NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ACCORDINGLY THEIR CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EXTENSIVELY DAMAGED THE LEASED UNIT IN EXCESS OF $16,000.00, WHICH DEFENDANT COMPLETED THE REPAIRS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
